title: Wanting to Review Changelogs
excerpt: I’m wanting to do a system audit on some of my programs and I am looking for the changelogs of programs. I haven’t been able to find the changelogs for Monday.com and I was wondering if there was a link to the page that …

posts.author: sfajulia (Julia Tanksley-McCoy)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m wanting to do a system audit on some of my programs and I am looking for the changelogs of programs. I haven’t been able to find the changelogs for Monday.com and I was wondering if there was a link to the page that has the list?

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @sfajulia ~ Welcome to the Community!

If you are looking for a log of the changes made to a board that you are working on within monday.com, then it sounds like you are looking for our Activity Log!

Check out this article for more details: What is the Activity Log?

If you are the Admin of an Enterprise Account, then you will also have acess to the Audit Log for checking security-related logs: The Audit Log

Is this what you were looking for? If not, can you elaborate on what kind of logs you were looking for?

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Cheers,
Jenna
